notifications.message: Approval Escalation workflow WF-2042 failed after 4m 50s. Agent: Governance. Recommendation: reroute to alternate approver via Workflow Engine.

notifications.title: SAP connector degraded — partial sync
notifications.message: SAP S/4HANA connector returning partial cost centre metadata. Last successful full sync: 07:30. Retry scheduled in 15 minutes.

notifications.title: Status report approved — Week 18
notifications.message: Elena Brooks approved the Week 18 status report and steering committee deck. Digital signature verified. Published to audit trail.

notifications.title: Agent run completed — Portfolio Strategy Optimisation
notifications.message: agent-06 completed portfolio optimisation in 77s. Output: re-ranked project list, resource reallocation scenario (£180k saving), optimisation report.

notifications.title: Resource request approved — 2 engineers allocated
notifications.message: Maya Chen approved the internal reallocation of 2 engineers from Atlas project to Mobile App Modernization for sprints 5–7. No additional cost incurred.

notifications.title: Lessons learned published to knowledge base
notifications.message: 4 lessons learned themes from Mobile App Modernization published with tags: delivery, vendor, resourcing, governance. Now surfaced in future intake recommendations.

notifications.title: Predictive alert — resource capacity approaching limit
notifications.message: Analytics model projects portfolio resource utilisation will breach 90% threshold in 3 weeks if current trajectory continues. Recommend capacity review this sprint.
